Reviewed newsletter canonicalization follow-up 2026-03-21 merged duplicate event dd3a0b2a-4a1c-589c-a4ef-31b14f813d16 ("Rambo! Pt"). Reason: rollover duplicate. Notes: The November 1995 issue scheduled the Jan. 20 Rambo event for 1996, not 1995, and the same event was later re-ingested from 1996-01.

Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1994/1996 deep review) updated canonical event metadata. Reason: The Jan. 20, 1996 Point Defiance score event should use the durable RAMBO title.
